'''dorazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wadeable|wadeable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wadeable|wadeable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dorazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dorazhithi|dorazhithi]] || [[word:dorazhiji|dorazhiji]] || [[word:dorazhishi|dorazhishi]] || [[word:dorazhiki|dorazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dorazhuthuthu|dorazhuthuthu]] || [[word:dorazhujuju|dorazhujuju]] || [[word:dorazhushushu|dorazhushushu]] || [[word:dorazhukuku|dorazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dorazhuthu|dorazhuthu]] || [[word:dorazhuju|dorazhuju]] || [[word:dorazhushu|dorazhushu]] || [[word:dorazhuku|dorazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dorazhufthuf|dorazhufthuf]] || [[word:dorazhufjuf|dorazhufjuf]] || [[word:dorazhufshuf|dorazhufshuf]] || [[word:dorazhufkuf|dorazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dorazhethe|dorazhethe]] || [[word:dorazheje|dorazheje]] || [[word:dorazheshe|dorazheshe]] || [[word:dorazheke|dorazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dorazhothotho|dorazhothotho]] || [[word:dorazhojojo|dorazhojojo]] || [[word:dorazhoshosho|dorazhoshosho]] || [[word:dorazhokoko|dorazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dorazhotho|dorazhotho]] || [[word:dorazhojo|dorazhojo]] || [[word:dorazhosho|dorazhosho]] || [[word:dorazhoko|dorazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dorazhofthof|dorazhofthof]] || [[word:dorazhofjof|dorazhofjof]] || [[word:dorazhofshof|dorazhofshof]] || [[word:dorazhofkof|dorazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfthĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfjĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfshĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfkĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfthĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfjĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfshĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfkĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfthĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfjĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfshĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dorazhĂŻfkĂŻf|dorazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dorazhĂŠthĂŠ|dorazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dorazhĂŠjĂŠ|dorazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dorazhĂŠshĂŠ|dorazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dorazhĂŠkĂŠ|dorazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dorazhathatha|dorazhathatha]] || [[word:dorazhajaja|dorazhajaja]] || [[word:dorazhashasha|dorazhashasha]] || [[word:dorazhakaka|dorazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dorazhatha|dorazhatha]] || [[word:dorazhaja|dorazhaja]] || [[word:dorazhasha|dorazhasha]] || [[word:dorazhaka|dorazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dorazhafthaf|dorazhafthaf]] || [[word:dorazhafjaf|dorazhafjaf]] || [[word:dorazhafshaf|dorazhafshaf]] || [[word:dorazhafkaf|dorazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dorazhasha|dorazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dorazhshĂ«sha|dorazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dorazhrosha|dorazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dorazhmusha|dorazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dorazhyasha|dorazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godorazhnkshĂ«sha|godorazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godorazhnkrosha|godorazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godorazhnkmusha|godorazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godorazhnkyasha|godorazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dorarazhasha|dorarazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dorarazhshĂ«sha|dorarazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dorarazhrosha|dorarazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dorarazhmusha|dorarazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dorarazhyasha|dorarazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godorarazhnkshĂ«sha|godorarazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godorarazhnkrosha|godorarazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godorarazhnkmusha|godorarazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godorarazhnkyasha|godorarazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:derĂŠzhasha|derĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:derĂŠzhshĂ«sha|derĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:derĂŠzhrosha|derĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:derĂŠzhmusha|derĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:derĂŠzhyasha|derĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goderĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|goderĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goderĂŠzhnkrosha|goderĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goderĂŠzhnkmusha|goderĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goderĂŠzhnkyasha|goderĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dorfazhasha|dorfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dorfazhshĂ«sha|dorfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dorfazhrosha|dorfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dorfazhmusha|dorfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dorfazhyasha|dorfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godorfazhnkshĂ«sha|godorfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godorfazhnkrosha|godorfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godorfazhnkmusha|godorfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godorfazhnkyasha|godorfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
